articles.title: Explore 600+ Operating Systems with Virtual OS Museum
articles.description: The Virtual OS Museum allows users to experience over 600 operating systems, from mainframes to Windows 95, directly on their desktops.
articles.impact: Users can explore computing history interactively.

articles.title: Gears of War: E-Day PS5 Port Rumored to be Canceled
articles.description: Rumors suggest that a PS5 version of Gears of War: E-Day was in development but has recently been canceled by Xbox.
articles.impact: This cancellation affects PS5 gamers' expectations.

articles.title: New Dummy Units Showcase iPhone Fold Design
articles.description: Dummy units reveal the design of Apple's anticipated foldable phone, expected to be announced later this year.
articles.impact: Apple's foldable phone could redefine the market.

articles.title: Xbox Games Showcase 2026: What to Expect
articles.description: The Xbox Games Showcase promises exciting announcements, including potential reveals for The Elder Scrolls 6 and Arkane's new game.
articles.impact: Fans eagerly await major game announcements.

articles.title: Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra Unveiled at Computex
articles.description: The Surface Laptop Ultra features Nvidia's RTX Spark chip and up to 128GB of unified memory, showcasing Microsoft's innovation.
articles.impact: Microsoft sets a new standard for laptops.

articles.title: 23 New Xbox Games Launch Next Week
articles.description: Next week, Xbox will release 23 new games, including three day-one titles for Game Pass subscribers, enhancing the gaming library.
articles.impact: Xbox Game Pass continues to expand its offerings.

articles.title: Blackwater Diver Captures Deep Sea Creatures
articles.description: Photographer Jialing Cai dives into the ocean at night, capturing stunning images of deep-sea creatures in their natural habitat.

articles.title: The Pokemon Company Reports Record Financials
articles.description: The Pokemon Company achieved record net sales of 531 billion yen, marking a 29% year-on-year increase in its latest financial report.
articles.impact: The Pokemon brand continues to thrive financially.

articles.title: Kojima Dismisses AI's Artistic Potential
articles.description: Hideo Kojima expresses skepticism about AI's ability to create art, stating he doesn't believe it will happen during his lifetime.
articles.impact: Kojima's views spark debate on AI's role.

articles.title: 30 Unique Graduation Gift Ideas
articles.description: A curated list of 30 thoughtful graduation gift ideas suitable for any level of achievement, from small tokens to significant presents.
articles.impact: Find the perfect gift for graduates.

articles.title: Control: Resonant Shifts to Action RPG Format
articles.description: The sequel to Control will adopt an action RPG format, reflecting the main character's approach, as revealed by Creative Director Mikael Kasurinen.
articles.impact: This change could attract new players.

articles.title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Maintains Mini-Games
articles.description: Square Enix confirms it has adjusted mini-games in Final Fantasy 7 Revelation but will not reduce them despite feedback.
articles.impact: Fans will appreciate the commitment to mini-games.

articles.title: Arizona Sunshine Coming to Nintendo Switch 2
articles.description: Vertigo Games announces Arizona Sunshine for Nintendo Switch 2, with details on launch timing to follow.
articles.impact: Switch 2 gamers can look forward to this title.

articles.title: GOG Apologizes for Controversial Email
articles.description: GOG issued an apology after sending a newsletter featuring Nazi symbols related to the game The End of the Sun.
articles.impact: GOG's error raises concerns about sensitivity.

articles.title: Citizen Sleeper Series Coming to Switch 2
articles.description: Citizen Sleeper and its sequel, Starward Vector, will launch on Nintendo Switch 2 on June 25, expanding the narrative RPG genre.
articles.impact: Fans of narrative RPGs have new options.
